cycles.trigger: Carried the israeli-healthcare-payroll v1.2.0 wage-agreement treatment across to the other payroll skills.
lessons: DEBT (22 entries): --check-sources shows 22 pre-existing v1.1.0 evidence snippets that do not appear at their cited URL. Spot-checks suggest most are English PARAPHRASES of Hebrew sources rather than verbatim quotes, i.e. the numbers were never verbatim-anchored. None were introduced in this cycle and none of the 11 new claims failed. Next cycle must re-quote them verbatim or mark verified_via honestly. This is the exact state israeli-healthcare-payroll was in while it was hiding a real 3.5-point error.

NEGATIVE FINDING worth keeping: the 17.7.2023 public-sector framework agreement does NOT apply to teachers (their dirugim are represented by Histadrut HaMorim / Irgun HaMorim, not the general Histadrut). Copying the healthcare skill's framework section across would have been wrong. Verify scope before transferring a layer between skills.

Oz LaTmura coordinator (rakaz) gmul rates changed on 1.9.2025 but the authoritative table is an unread IMAGE. The skill routes those to the circular instead of asserting rates. Read the image next cycle and encode them.

Oz LaTmura wage-reduction rate for 1.5.2025-31.12.2025 is NOT CAPTURED: the 0.95% mitigation is scoped to Ofek Chadash only and no Irgun HaMorim equivalent was found. The skill says the law rate of 3.307% applies unless a separate agreement is located. Re-check next cycle.
A signed Oz tranche of +250 NIS lands 1.9.2026, weeks after this cycle. Re-verify it was paid on the next update.

stable_success: מורה שמלמדת גם בחטיבת ביניים וגם בתיכון, איך מחשבים שכר?
מורה מלמדת חלק בחטיבת ביניים וחלק בחטיבה עליונה, זכאית לשכר לפי שתי הרפורמות?
איך מחשבים שכר של מתכנת בהייטק? (negative, correctly excluded)
מורה בעוז לתמורה, כמה שעות פרונטליות במשרה מלאה?

lessons: Added split-appointment / dual-reform coverage (Step 1b, Example 4, Gotcha 9): a teacher teaching in both a junior-high (Ofek) and a high school (Oz) earns under both reforms, each part by its position fraction, summed. Sourced from kesefmorim.com + the gov Portal Ovdei Horaa position-scope page (which documents העסקה מקבילה בשתי הרפורמות).

Expert review CRITICAL corrected before ship: reform is NOT employer. A six-year school run by a single baalut/reshut pays both divisions on one payslip with no teum mas; the two-payer / teum mas / ichud discussion is now gated on 'only when two separate payers'.

Cross-reform rank is recognized/converted, not independently invented per table; the skill now says read the recognized rank per reform and do not invent a conversion. The exact hamarat-daragot mapping was NOT asserted (no verifiable source) - if a future cycle finds an authoritative source for the simultaneous-split rank mapping, encode it.
Two-role-gmul cap is per teacher counted across the whole appointment, not two-per-division - reconnected in Step 1b + Example 4.

Pension across two employers: each payer deposits separately (possibly different funds/ceilings); ichud consolidates. Noted but the exact deposit-ceiling interaction across two payers was left to the slip - candidate for a future deepening if users ask.
